ElevenLabs Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

AI text-to-speech and voice cloning known for highly realistic voices.

MakerElevenLabs
CategoryAI Voice & Audio Tools
PricingFree plan available (limited characters/month); paid plans from $5/mo
Free tierYes
WebsiteVisit ElevenLabs →

Best for

Podcasters, video creators, and developers needing realistic narration.

Pros

  • Extremely realistic, natural-sounding voices
  • Supports voice cloning and multiple languages
  • API access for developers

Cons

  • Free tier character limit is fairly small
  • Voice cloning raises ethical/consent considerations

Alternatives to ElevenLabs

Murf AI

AI voiceover platform aimed at presentations, e-learning, and marketing videos.

Otter.ai

AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.
